narrative:
Findlay 6A (precinct in Hancock County) has 491 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.8 percentage points.
